title: Creamy British Citrus Trifle
description: A creamy and comforting British dessert featuring citrus flavors and a Cajun twist, made with infused oil and raw friendly ingredients in a trifle form.
instructions: Start by making the infused oil by mixing lemon and orange zest with oil and letting it sit for a few hours.
In a large bowl, whip the heavy cream until stiff peaks form.
In a separate bowl, mix together the granulated sugar, Cajun spice, and vanilla extract.
Fold the sugar mixture into the whipped cream until well combined.
Dip each ladyfinger into the infused oil and then into the cream mixture, coating both sides evenly.
In a large serving dish, create a layer of ladyfingers.
Spread half of the orange marmalade over the ladyfingers.
Repeat the layers, starting with the ladyfingers, then the cream mixture, and finally the remaining orange marmalade.
Top the trifle with fresh orange segments and a sprinkle of granulated sugar.
Drizzle the fresh lemon juice over the top of the trifle.
Refrigerate the trifle for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld together.
